_doc: Limited Edition Beta (LEB) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/leb.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 75C / 95U / 117R / 0M. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Second printing of the original Limited Edition. Sold in 15-card booster packs (36/box) and 60-card starter decks. Striped collation, 11x11 sheets, common-uncommon-rare ordering. Three basic-land art variations. No foils (pre-1999). Rare sheet filler is Islands.
